data.title: Both WTI and Brent crude oil prices continued to weaken, with Brent crude hitting $100 per barrel.
data.description: Gate data shows that both WTI and Brent crude oil prices continued to weaken, with Brent crude oil falling to $100 per barrel, down 2.10% on the day, and WTI crude oil currently down 2.3%.

data.title: A major whale's long positions in Brent crude oil were liquidated, resulting in a cumulative loss of over $1.44 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale increased its long position in BRENTOIL within the past hour, which was subsequently liquidated within one minute due to a price drop, resulting in a loss of $918,000. The whale's cumulative losses have now exceeded $1.44 million.

data.title: Gate released its March data for CandyDrop, Launchpool, and HODLer Airdrop, showing that the Launchpool project reached a peak annualized return of 751.33%.
data.description: Official data shows that Gate's three major airdrop platforms performed steadily in March. Gate CandyDrop launched 6 projects in March, with contract trading volume exceeding $15 billion and over 210,000 participants. Gate Launchpool launched 2 projects in March, with IDOS achieving a maximum annualized return of 751.33%. During the same period, Gate HODLer Airdrop peaked at 12.26% annualized return, with approximately $196 million in staked funds. It is reported that Gate CandyDrop has launched 152 events since its launch a year ago, employing an innovative "task-driven" model. Users can earn "airdrops" by completing various tasks such as trading, depositing, and inviting friends, and then redeem them for high-quality tokens for airdrops. Gate Launchpool, as an innovative staking airdrop platform, supports staking of various tokens including GT, BTC, ETH, USDT, and GUSD, distributing new tokens hourly with high returns. It offers low entry barriers and high annualized returns, helping users capture market opportunities. In addition, after staking and choosing to redeem, users can transfer their assets to the Gate HODLer 7-day fixed-term product to receive an additional airdrop reward of up to 116.667% on top of their original staking returns. Gate HODLer Airdrop is dedicated to discovering high-potential projects and reducing investment risk through its airdrop mechanism. Users only need to hold 1 GT to easily participate in and receive free airdrops.

data.title: Market Reduces ECB Rate Hike Expectations by 63 Basis Points This Year
data.description: The market has adjusted its expectations for the European Central Bank's (ECB) interest rate hikes, now predicting an increase of 63 basis points for the year. According to Jin10, this shift reflects changing economic conditions and investor sentiment. The adjustment comes amid ongoing discussions about the ECB's monetary policy and its impact on the European economy. Analysts are closely monitoring these developments as they could influence financial markets and economic growth in the region.

data.title: JU Token Surpasses 2.1 USDT Mark
data.description: According to Odaily, the latest market data from Ju.com indicates that the JU token has exceeded the 2.1 USDT threshold, currently trading at 2.11 USDT. This marks a 24-hour increase of 2.4%.

data.title: Goldman Sachs downplays expectations for a Fed rate hike this year
data.description: Goldman Sachs analysts noted in a report that market pricing in the US federal funds rate has fluctuated wildly since the outbreak of the Iraq War, but the likelihood of a rate hike this year remains low. Analysts stated that the current supply shock is smaller in scale and more limited than previous inflationary shocks, and oil price increases are less than in the 1970s. Furthermore, they believe that "the current economic starting point makes a widespread spillover of inflation less likely," and the current starting point of monetary policy also reduces the probability of a rate hike. Analysts emphasized: "The Fed typically does not tighten policy solely in response to oil shocks." (Jinshi)

data.title: JU broke through 2.1 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 2.4%.
data.description: According to Ju.com, JU has broken through 2.1 USDT and is currently trading at 2.11 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 2.4%.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Analysts: Low Probability of Fed Rate Hike Despite Market Volatility
data.description: Goldman Sachs analysts have highlighted that since the onset of the Iraq War, the market pricing of the U.S. federal funds rate has experienced significant fluctuations. According to Jin10, the analysts noted that the likelihood of a rate hike this year remains low. They pointed out that the current supply shock is relatively minor and more contained compared to past inflation-inducing shocks, with oil price increases being less severe than those in the 1970s. Additionally, they believe that the economic starting point reduces the likelihood of widespread inflation spillover, and the current monetary policy stance further diminishes the probability of a rate hike. The analysts emphasized that the Federal Reserve typically does not implement tightening policies solely in response to oil shocks.

data.title: Eurozone Inflation Data Supports Bond Market Stability Amid Easter Holiday
data.description: Germany's Commerzbank interest rate strategist Hauke Siemssen has highlighted the fragile recovery of the bond market as the Easter long weekend approaches, according to Jin10. He noted that while the bond market appears to have eased, risk appetite is evident across various market sectors. Additionally, U.S. President Donald Trump is reportedly considering ending the war with Iran, which, along with slightly lower-than-expected preliminary inflation data from the Eurozone, has contributed to market stability. Due to the Easter holiday, the issuance of government bonds in the Eurozone will be limited for the remainder of the week. On Wednesday, Germany will conduct an auction offering €4 billion of federal bonds maturing in November 2032.

data.title: Uniswap Foundation Releases Financial Summary for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description:
The Uniswap Foundation has released its financial summary for the fiscal year 2025. According to Foresight News, the foundation reported holding $49.9 million in cash and stablecoins, 15.1 million UNI tokens, and 240 ETH by the end of 2025. The token holdings were valued at $85.8 million at the time.

The foundation anticipates that its funds will last until January 2027. Throughout the year, new grant commitments totaled $26 million, with $11 million already disbursed. In the fourth quarter alone, new commitments amounted to $5.8 million, with $2.1 million disbursed. Operational expenses for the year reached $9.7 million, excluding employee token rewards.

Additionally, the foundation acquired 20.3 million UNI tokens from the Uniswap Treasury through the Uniswap Unleashed proposal, valued at approximately $114 million at the end of the year.

data.title: Nike Shares Drop 8.7% in Frankfurt After Unexpected Sales Forecast Cut
data.description: Nike shares fell by 8.7% in early trading on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange following the company's unexpected revision of its fourth-quarter sales forecast. According to Jin10, the sportswear giant's decision to lower its sales expectations has raised concerns among investors, leading to a significant drop in its stock price. The adjustment in the forecast comes amid challenging market conditions and heightened competition in the industry. Nike's revised outlook has prompted analysts to reassess the company's growth prospects for the remainder of the fiscal year.

data.title: Keeta Network Expands Payment Options with Alchemy Pay Integration
data.description: Keeta Network has announced the integration of Alchemy Pay to facilitate direct payments and transfers, including ACH transfers from USD accounts. According to NS3.AI, this update introduces named dollar accounts and automatic withdrawal features, enhancing the network's payment capabilities.

data.title: Japanese and South Korean stock indices surged, with the South Korean KOSPI index closing up 9%.
data.description: South Korea's KOSPI index surged 9% in late trading, currently standing at 5507.50 points. Japan's Nikkei 225 index jumped 5.00% intraday, currently at 53625.91 points. (Jinshi)

data.title: Strive's Bitcoin-Backed Stock Sees Significant Trading Volume
data.description: Strive's Bitcoin-backed preferred stock, SATA, experienced substantial trading activity, with approximately $43 million exchanged in a single day after achieving its $100 par value. According to NS3.AI, Jeff Walton highlighted that JPMorgan's comparable variable-rate preferred stock traded around $5.9 million on the same day, despite having 3.5 times more shares outstanding than SATA.

data.title: CFTC Warns Prediction Markets on Insider Trading Laws
data.description: CFTC enforcement director David Miller has issued a warning that insider trading laws are applicable to prediction markets. According to NS3.AI, this announcement comes as the sector recently surpassed $20 billion in monthly volume, as reported by TRM Labs. Miller emphasized that the agency will exercise prosecutorial discretion, particularly targeting cases involving tipped or misappropriated information.

data.title: LML Token Plummets After $950,000 Hack
data.description: According to PeckShield, the LML token suffered a significant hack resulting in a loss of approximately $950,000. Following the attack, the value of the LML token plunged by 99.6%. The attacker converted 950,000 USDT into 450.6 ETH and subsequently deposited the funds into TornadoCash.

data.title: PeckShield: LML token price plummets 99.6% due to hacking attack.
data.description: According to PeckShield, LML suffered a loss of approximately $950,000 due to a hack, causing the LML token to plummet by 99.6%. The attackers exchanged 950,000 USDT for 450.6 ETH and deposited it into TornadoCash.

data.title: New York City Lifts TikTok Ban on Government Devices
data.description: New York City has decided to lift its ban on TikTok for government electronic devices, allowing departments to resume posting on the platform. According to NS3.AI, a memo from the Mayor's Office stated that the change aims to enhance public communication. The memo also outlined requirements for using TikTok, including the use of dedicated devices, the exclusion of sensitive data, and the appointment of designated account managers.

data.title: KOSDAQ Circuit Breaker Activated as KOSDAQ150 Index Futures Surge 6%
data.description: South Korea's stock exchange implemented a circuit breaker following a 6% rise in KOSDAQ150 index futures. According to NS3.AI, this significant increase prompted the automatic trading halt to stabilize the market and prevent excessive volatility. Circuit breakers are mechanisms used by exchanges to temporarily halt trading in response to substantial price movements, ensuring orderly market conditions. The activation of the circuit breaker reflects heightened investor activity and market dynamics in South Korea's financial markets.
